lighting.shadow_character: 짙고 긴 그림자 (Deep and long shadows)

color.grading_style: 상업적 필름룩 (Commercial film look with teal in shadows)

composition.composition_rule: 격자 구도 및 대각선 구도 (Grid and Diagonal)

texture.detail_rendering: 경광을 활용한 질감 극대화 (Texture maximization using hard light)

mood.tone: 활기차고 이국적이며 즐거운 분위기 (Vibrant, Exotic, Convivial)

improvement_notes: 고급/파인다이닝 스타일을 위해 부드러운 조명 사용, 내추럴/오가닉 스타일을 위해 채도와 웜톤 감소, 미니멀/모던 스타일을 위해 피사체 축소 및 여백 활용 제안.
nano_banana_prompt: A vibrant and energetic flat lay photo of [Your Food Subject, e.g., a rustic pizza and a glass of red wine]. The scene is set on a rustic terracotta tile surface. The lighting is a single source of harsh, direct sunlight coming from the top-left, casting long, crisp, dramatic shadows across the frame. The color palette is extremely warm and saturated, with punchy reds, deep oranges, and rich greens, creating a sun-drenched, golden hour mood. The image is hyper-detailed, with sharp focus and rich textures. Professional food photography, editorial style, high contrast, Kodak Ektar 100 film aesthetic. --ar 4:5
